title: BPSSC – Havildar Instructor – 122 Posts
shortInfo: BPSSC Recruitment 2026 aims to fill 122 vacancies for Havildar Instructor posts. Eligible candidates with 12th Pass can apply online from 01-05-2026 to 01-06-2026 through the official BPSSC website, bpssc.bihar.gov.in.

basic_details.job_title: BPSSC Bihar Police Havildar Instructor Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 122 Posts
basic_details.short_information: BPSSC Recruitment 2026 aims to fill 122 vacancies for Havildar Instructor posts. Eligible candidates with 12th Pass can apply online from 01-05-2026 to 01-06-2026 through the official BPSSC website, bpssc.bihar.gov.in.
basic_details.organization_name: Bihar Home Guard Service Cadre, Home Department (Special Branch), Govt. of Bihar

qualification.education_qualification: Intermediate (10+2) passed or equivalent from a recognized board/institution, as on 01-08-2025.

selection_process: Written Competitive Examination (100 Marks) + Physical Efficiency Test (100 Marks)
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online only through the BPSSC website. Hard copy of applications need not be sent to the Commission. Candidates should visit https://bpssc.bihar.gov.in and click on the "Home Guard" tab, then click the link related to Advt. No. 05/2026 to begin the application process. Only one online application can be submitted per candidate. If multiple applications are submitted by a candidate, all will be rejected and legal action may also be taken.
seo_tags: Bihar Police Subordinate Services Commission Havildar Instructor Recruitment 2026
